name: update_draft
trigger_description:
Use this tool when:
The user asks to change, revise, or edit an existing draft.

Do not use this tool when:
Adding or removing attachments (use add_attachments / remove_attachments).
Creating a new draft (use create_draft).
Sending the draft (use send_draft).
Sequencing and clarifications:
If the user requests both content edits and attachment changes, call update_draft first, then call add_attachments or remove_attachments.
If no draft_id is provided, call list_drafts or get_draft to identify the target and ask the user to confirm which draft to modify.
Ask explicit clarifying questions when recipients, body edits, or which attachments to change are unspecified.
